topic: How to Reduce Customer Support Tickets by 50% Without Hiring More Staff

manual_inputs.Topic: How to Reduce Customer Support Tickets by 50% Without Hiring More Staff
manual_inputs.Secondary Keywords:
reduce customer support tickets AI	
AI customer support for business · automate customer service · AI chatbot business · 24/7 customer support without hiring
manual_inputs.Target Persona: Priya S. — The ROI-Accountable Operations Leader (35–50, Head of Ops/COO, 50–300 employees, Europe & North America, needs board-reportable ROI)
manual_inputs.Angle / Hook: Outcome-led, ROI-focused. Priya's support team is overwhelmed, SLAs are slipping, and she's being asked to fix it without adding headcount. This article gives her the 'how' — with real percentages and a clear before/after framework she can take to her CFO. Position AI support as augmentation (not replacement) to address the staff morale fear.
manual_inputs.Internal Links: Arsuno.ai AI Chat Support feature page · Healthcare case study · Smart Document Handling (cross-link)
manual_inputs.Notes: Use Arsuno.ai stat: '40% cost reduction' and '98% client satisfaction'. Must address GDPR/data compliance early (paragraph 2 or 3) — this is Priya's first filter. Avoid presenting AI as a threat to staff jobs — frame as 'removes the frustrating tasks, frees people for relationship work'. Use concrete numbers throughout. Avoid vague claims. Reference Zendesk/Freshdesk as existing tools AI integrates with (shows stack awareness).
